title: Crystal Town Mod
description: A mod that adds a slightly elaborate universe! A couple of dimensions, lots of interesting mobs, progression, magic wands and toxic weapons!
body:
# What kind of mod is this?
A mod that adds a slightly elaborate universe of me and my friend Kega! A couple of dimensions, lots of interesting mobs, progression, magic wands and toxic weapons!
## What am I supposed to do in this world?
You'll find a wasteland in the upper world, riding a metal bike, fighting raiders, and finding crystal wheat seeds and slingshots in their camps! You'll need to craft a pink scary slingshot from a couple of sparkling drinks and head to the world of SGT4o, where you'll be greeted by many interesting biomes - like the Postal Glade, Pearl Seas and Pearl Beaches, Forests, where stars will fall on you, combining them with a special kind of cactus you can get star ingots! In each biome you will find a lot of unique mobs like Crystals, Postage Stamps, Keys, Stones, Candles, Mushrooms, large Torches and more! There are many interactions in the mod and you can dive headfirst into this world, good luck, traveller!
